html:
Exclusive to:

“Researching garden plants at different stages of growth adds to the Plant Registery.”

-

The Gardeneer Hat is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in Return of Them update. It is crafted at the Science Machine with one Bucket-o-poop, three Seeds, and one Electrical Doodad.

A player wearing a Gardeneer Hat is able to research plants throughout their stages of development. The information is added to the Plant Registry. The player will also be able to access the Plant Registry in-game by right-clicking on the Gardeneer Hat.

The Gardeneer Hat allows the player to examine if a plant is stressed or not, but it doesn't indicate the source of the stress. It provides 60 points of protection from Overheating.

Premier Gardeneer Hat

“Researching garden plants at different stages of growth adds to the Plant Registery.

Wearer can see the quantity of nutrients in farm soil.”

-

The Premier Gardeneer Hat is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in Return of Them update. It is crafted at the Ancient Pseudoscience Station with one Gardeneer Hat, four Thulecite Fragments, and one Purple Gem.

The Premier Gardeneer Hat has the same uses as the Gardeneer Hat, but also allows the player to see the quantity of Nutrients in Farm Soil. It also provides information on one source of stress when examining a plant.

Wormwood does not need the Premier Gardeneer Hat to find out a source of stress when examining a plant.

Trivia

  • The Gardeneer Hat and the Premier Gardeneer Hat were introduced in the Reap What You Sow update.
  • Maxwell's examination quote for the Premier Gardeneer Hat seems to imply that after discovering and becoming reliant on Nightmare Fuel, The Ancients began to subsist on it, possibly eating it instead of regular food.
    • This is supported by Maxwell's examination quote for the Ancient Kiln.
    • This may have been a factor leading to their downfall, and could be why The Ancients ended up "shedding their skin", with one or more of them becoming the Ancient Herald.

Gallery

  • Gardeneer Hat Equipped
  • Premier Gardeneer Hat Equipped
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

Gardeneer Hat
"Allow your gardening expertise to grow."
Object Info
Perk
Allow plant research
Equipable
Does not stack
Protection

×1 ×3 ×1
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"plantregistryhat"
“To understand the plant, you must wear the plant.”
–Wilson
“Nooo I don't want my head full of plant nerd facts!”
–Willow
“Is helmet for gardening?”
–Wolfgang
“I don't like to play in the dirt...”
–Wendy
“AGRICULTURAL KNOWLEDGE DATABASE”
–WX-78
“It seems to be a wearable directory of sorts, detailing various plant strains.”
–Wickerbottom
“Looks like some organic headwear.”
–Woodie
“I'm really supposed to put that contraption on my head?”
–Maxwell
“This is nö helm för a warriör!”
–Wigfrid
“It's teaching us so much about plants!”
–Webber
“It never hurts to learn more about what goes into your food.”
–Warly
“Wear friend on head!”
–Wormwood
“Better fill my noggin' with some planting know-how.”
–Winona
“I beg your pardon, is that a hat for the garden?”
–Wortox
“Wear plant on head to learn about plant? Make sense, florp!”
–Wurt
“It's like a handbook you wear on your head! A headbook?”
–Walter
“What a funny little hat. Let me try!”
–Wanda
“Researching garden plants at different stages of growth adds to the Plant Registery.”
-
The Gardeneer Hat is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in Return of Them update. It is crafted at the Science Machine with one Bucket-o-poop, three Seeds, and one Electrical Doodad.
A player wearing a Gardeneer Hat is able to research plants throughout their stages of development. The information is added to the Plant Registry. The player will also be able to access the Plant Registry in-game by right-clicking on the Gardeneer Hat.
The Gardeneer Hat allows the player to examine if a plant is stressed or not, but it doesn't indicate the source of the stress. It provides 60 points of protection from Overheating.

“This will help me see all the science hiding in the dirt.”
–Wilson
“Wow, I always wanted dirt vision... said nobody ever.”
–Willow
“Fills Wolfgang's head with the plant know-hows!”
–Wolfgang
“I used to like reading about plants... I suppose this is similar in a way.”
–Wendy
“UPGRADED AGRICULTURAL KNOWLEDGE DATABASE”
–WX-78
“The prudent gardener ensures they are able to discern every detail about their crops.”
–Wickerbottom
“This thing sure helps take the guesswork out of gardening.”
–Woodie
“I suppose the Ancients were farmers once, before they turned to the fuel.”
–Maxwell
“I care nöt för learning aböut that which spröuts fröm the dirt.”
–Wigfrid
“It shows us how good the dirt is, and lots of other stuff too!”
–Webber
“I'd best ensure our plants are well fed with the proper nutrients!”
–Warly
“Friend looks cozy there”
–Wormwood
“It's kinda fancy-shmancy for farming, but at least it's useful.”
–Winona
“The gardener's crown to set upon my furry brow.”
–Wortox
“Extra shiny plant learning hat!”
–Wurt
“Woah, I can see right through the dirt!”
–Walter
“It's given me a new perspective on gardening. Quite literally.”
–Wanda
“Researching garden plants at different stages of growth adds to the Plant Registery.
Wearer can see the quantity of nutrients in farm soil.”
-
The Premier Gardeneer Hat is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in Return of Them update. It is crafted at the Ancient Pseudoscience Station with one Gardeneer Hat, four Thulecite Fragments, and one Purple Gem.
The Premier Gardeneer Hat has the same uses as the Gardeneer Hat, but also allows the player to see the quantity of Nutrients in Farm Soil. It also provides information on one source of stress when examining a plant.
Wormwood does not need the Premier Gardeneer Hat to find out a source of stress when examining a plant.
Usage[edit | edit source]
×4
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Gardeneer Hat and the Premier Gardeneer Hat were introduced in the Reap What You Sow update.
Maxwell's examination quote for the Premier Gardeneer Hat seems to imply that after discovering and becoming reliant on Nightmare Fuel, The Ancients began to subsist on it, possibly eating it instead of regular food.
This is supported by Maxwell's examination quote for the Ancient Kiln.
This may have been a factor leading to their downfall, and could be why The Ancients ended up "shedding their skin", with one or more of them becoming the Ancient Herald.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mũ Gardeneer là một Vật phẩm độc quyền của Don't Starve Together và được giới thiệu trong bản cập nhật Return of Them. Nó được chế tạo tại Máy Khoa học với một Xô-o-poop, ba Hạt giống và một Doodad Điện.
